meaning: n.卫理公会派教徒adj.卫理公会教派的
examples: He was confirmed as a member of the Methodist Church.
Edwards is a Methodist lay preacher and social worker.
There were the churches—Baptist, Methodist, and Presbyterian—facing each other at the intersection of Second and Elm like wary sentries, their steeples competing for height.
Almost every American town is dotted by historic Episcopal, United Methodist, Lutheran, Presbyterian and Congregationalist churches.
For days after, I walked through the house muttering and considering becoming a Methodist.
